title: Cinematic Smoothness
description: A lightweight mod to customize and enhance Minecraft's cinematic camera with variable smoothness, letterbox bars, and a settings menu.
body:
🎥 Cinematic Smoothness

> **📹 A lightweight enhancement for Minecraft's Cinematic Camera mode.** > > *Includes additional tools: cinematic letterbox bars (black bars), a subtle FOV tightening toggle, and UI visibility controls.* ![settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1ebd9ce86e499fd2352a4c5eaadcdab75a96d3d.png)

## ✨ Key Features: - **🎯 Precision Smoothness:** Go beyond vanilla limits. Adjust camera "drag" from 0–100% with more Extended Range -100% for Sharper, more responsive to 200% for ultra-slow, sweeping movement. - **🎬 Professional Letterboxing:** Toggle cinematic black bars with two modes: Behind HUD or Cover HUD. - **🔍 Subtle FOV Tightening:** Slightly narrows the Field of View for cleaner focal shots. - **🚫 Clean View Toggles:** Optionally hide the **Crosshair** and **Block Selection Outline** for pure cinematic recordings. - **💾 Auto-Save + Reset:** Your settings are saved between sessions , Built-in **Reset** button to instantly restore default values ## 🛠️ Quick Start: - **Default Key:** Press **F4** to open the Cinematic Smoothness settings. - **Customization:** Go to `Options > Controls > Key Binds`. Under the **"Miscellaneous"** category, you can rebind both the **"Toggle Cinematic Camera"** and the **"Cinematic Smoothness Settings"**.
🔍 Frequently Asked Questions - **Does this replace vanilla cinematic mode?** No — it enhances it. It uses the same cinematic toggle but gives you more control over the physics. - **Is it client-side?** Yes. 100% client-side. Safe for servers.
💻 Development > 🤖 The technical coding, custom UI design, and internal camera math were developed with the assistance of [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com) (Google AI) and [Claude](https://claude.ai) (Anthropic AI), built using [IntelliJ IDEA](https://www.jetbrains.com/idea/). ![Built with Gemini](https://img.shields.io/badge/Built%20with-Gemini-8E75B2?style=flat-square&logo=googlegemini&logoColor=white) ![Built with Claude](https://img.shields.io/badge/Built%20with-Claude-CC785C?style=flat-square&logo=anthropic&logoColor=white) ![IntelliJ IDEA](https://img.shields.io/badge/IDE-IntelliJ%20IDEA-000000?style=flat-square&logo=intellijidea&logoColor=white)
🧩 Requirements - **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** ![Required](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Required-blue?style=flat-square&logo=fabric&logoColor=white) (Essential library) - **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** ![Optional](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Optional-707070?style=flat-square&logo=modmenu&logoColor=white) (in‑game mod list)
